understood_request: Find all products that have work orders with a due date within the last 30 days, where the work order status is not complete, and where qty_stocked on the work order is less than qty_required. Return product identity, work order identity, and the relevant quantities.

mart.ddl: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mart_open_work_orders_understocked (product_bk VARCHAR, product_name VARCHAR, sku VARCHAR, product_line VARCHAR, product_class VARCHAR, work_order_bk VARCHAR, due_date TIMESTAMP, start_date TIMESTAMP, end_date TIMESTAMP, qty_required BIGINT, qty_stocked BIGINT, qty_scrapped BIGINT, qty_shortfall BIGINT, mart_insert_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mart.populate_sql: DELETE FROM mart_open_work_orders_understocked; INSERT INTO mart_open_work_orders_understocked SELECT hp.product_bk, spd.product_name, spd.sku, spd.product_line, spd.product_class, hwo.work_order_bk, swod.due_date, swod.start_date, swod.end_date, swod.qty_required, swod.qty_stocked, swod.qty_scrapped, CAST(swod.qty_required AS BIGINT) - CAST(swod.qty_stocked AS BIGINT) AS qty_shortfall, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS mart_insert_dts FROM hub_work_order hwo INNER JOIN sat_work_order_details swod ON hwo.work_order_hk = swod.work_order_hk AND swod.load_end_dts IS NULL AND swod.due_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND swod.due_date <= CURRENT_DATE AND swod.qty_stocked < swod.qty_required INNER JOIN lnk_product_work_order lpwo ON hwo.work_order_hk = lpwo.work_order_hk INNER JOIN hub_product hp ON lpwo.product_hk = hp.product_hk INNER JOIN sat_product_details spd ON hp.product_hk = spd.product_hk AND spd.load_end_dts IS NULL
